name: shamcash/module-payment
description: Sham Cash (شام كاش) reconciliation payment gateway for Magento 2 — Luma, GraphQL and REST.

suggest.magento/module-graph-ql: Enables the Sham Cash GraphQL queries and mutation for headless storefronts.
suggest.magento/module-quote-graph-ql: Required to expose Sham Cash as a GraphQL cart payment method.
